2026-05-01.mealName: Skim Milk Cappuccino and Chocolate Croissant
2026-05-01.notes: Assumed a standard chocolate croissant (approx. 80-90g) and a typical large skim milk cappuccino (250ml milk). Milk calculations are for skim milk. Croissant nutritional data is based on averages for a chocolate pastry.
Assumed a standard Fishbowl 'OG Chicken' bowl with chicken, brown rice, standard mix of veggies (carrots, cabbage, edamame), and a typical dressing (e.g., miso sesame or shoyu).

2026-05-01.mealName: Sourdough Bread with Cream Cheese and Gouda Cheese
2026-05-01.notes: Assumed 1 medium slice (approx 50g) sourdough bread, 2 tablespoons full-fat cream cheese, and 1 slice (approx 20g) gouda cheese.
Assumed a standard 250ml (approximately 8.5 fl oz) cappuccino made with skim milk and no added sugar or syrup. Coffee itself contributes negligible calories.
